transcript:
CALLER: Hi, I need to cancel my appointment. Something came up at work.
AGENT: I'm sorry to hear that. Could I have your name and the appointment date so I can pull it up?
CALLER: Ananya Kulkarni. It was for this Thursday, I think 11 AM.
AGENT: Let me check... yes, I see an appointment for Ananya Kulkarni, Thursday 11 AM with Dr. Pramod Joshi. You'd like to cancel this?
CALLER: Yes, please. And uh, actually can I reschedule instead? To next week maybe?
AGENT: Absolutely. Dr. Joshi has openings next Tuesday at 10 AM and next Wednesday at 3 PM. Which works for you?
CALLER: Tuesday 10 AM please.
AGENT: Done! Your appointment is rescheduled to Tuesday at 10 AM with Dr. Joshi. Is there anything else?
CALLER: No, that's great. Thank you for understanding.
AGENT: No problem at all. We'll see you next Tuesday!
